meta.title: kunal.bhatia ~ senior frontend engineer
meta.description: Kunal Rajan Bhatia — Senior Frontend Engineer & Project Lead. 15+ years shipping React at scale: micro-frontends, integrations, browser extensions.
meta.author: Kunal Rajan Bhatia

hero.description: I'm a frontend engineer with 15+ years of experience shipping React at scale. Currently leading frontend work for Intuit's 1099 Tax Center at Persistent Systems — with a track record of architecting micro-frontends, OAuth2 integrations, browser extensions, and Slack apps for Bloomfire, GoTo, and beyond.

about.title: about
paragraphs: Over 15+ years, I've moved from Flash/ActionScript and PHP to leading React micro-frontends for one of the world's largest financial software companies. Today I work as a Project Lead at Persistent Systems, embedded with Intuit — analyzing PRDs, running feasibility studies, leading POCs, and shipping UI that reaches millions of small-business owners at tax time.

My sweet spot is the intersection of frontend architecture and integration engineering: OAuth2 flows, browser extensions, Slack apps, and enterprise connectors — where the hard problems live in state, permissions, and cross-platform consistency. I've owned end-to-end delivery for Bloomfire's Chrome/Edge extension and Slack app, and led HaloPSA and ConnectWise integrations with GoTo Resolve.

I care about performance (Suspense, lazy loading, profiling), design systems (QBDS → IDS migration at Intuit), and the small stuff — accessibility, i18n, feature-flagged rollouts. Outside work, I tinker with Claude-powered MCP servers and a calorie-tracking side project on n8n + Supabase.

items.label: intuit / 1099-tax-center
items.title: Intuit 1099 Tax Center
items.description: Led frontend development across multiple micro-frontend repositories for Intuit's 1099 tax filing platform. Spearheaded the end-to-end redesign of the shopping page — replacing the legacy Deluxe Forms experience — and drove IES branding upgrades across the contractor payment ecosystem.
bullets: Architected and shipped the full new shopping page UI, replacing legacy Deluxe Forms
Led the IES branding upgrade — replaced deprecated design tokens, aligned icons and color schemes
Implemented feature flagging for Atlas pricing changes and state pricing logic for controlled rollouts
Optimized performance via Suspense / lazy loading, deferred generate calls, and targeted profiling
Migrated QBDS → IDS design system across repos; applied state filing updates and localization

items.label: bloomfire / browser-extension
items.title: Browser Extension — Chrome & Edge
items.description: Secure, branded Chrome/Edge extension that lets users search, query AI, and access bookmarks without leaving their workflow — integrated with Bloomfire's platform.
bullets: Architected OAuth2 flow with session persistence and community-level access control
Designed persistent right-side docking, dynamic theming, multi-community switching
Directed CI/CD pipeline for automated linting, testing, and store submissions

items.label: bloomfire / slack-app
items.title: Bloomfire Slack Application
items.description: A marketplace-ready Slack app enabling seamless knowledge access, AI-powered search, and community interactions directly inside Slack.
bullets: Architected dual OAuth2 between Slack and Bloomfire with secure token lifecycle management
Built Slack App Home with dynamic tabs for AI queries, search history, and community context
Implemented slash commands, @mentions, and link unfurling with access control

items.label: goto / halo-integration
items.title: HaloPSA × GoTo Resolve
items.description: Integrated HaloPSA with GoTo Resolve — delivering remote support, asset sync, and automated ticketing inside Halo to streamline MSP workflows.
bullets: Built workflows for remote session initiation and alert acknowledgment from within Halo
Webhook-based ticketing triggered by asset performance failures for proactive incident management
Integrated asset sync for accurate device mapping and tenant alignment

items.label: goto / connectwise
items.title: ConnectWise × GoTo Resolve
items.description: Enabled remote support and alert-driven ticketing inside ConnectWise — managing cross-functional collaboration and delivering within tight deadlines.
bullets: Architected configuration pods and device syncing to reduce context-switching
Alert-based ticket creation with contextual links to GTRe device views and actions
API integration for tenant and device mapping across platforms

items.label: goto / resolve-intune
items.title: Resolve × Microsoft Intune
items.description: Unified device management inside Resolve — streamlining onboarding of Intune-managed devices with centralized compliance and configuration.
bullets: Designed setup and pairing workflows for Intune-managed device onboarding
Centralized configuration and compliance management directly in Resolve
Implemented script execution to install Resolve applet on Intune devices

items.label: goto / rescue-jira
items.title: Rescue × Jira Service Desk
items.description: Engineered a Rescue remote support app inside Jira Service Desk — secure auth, session history, telemetry, and multilingual UI.
bullets: Built on Forge 2.0 with Node and React for a responsive support-desk experience
In-Jira Rescue session initiation with real-time links and session history
Added telemetry (Segment + Amplitude) and i18n for global accessibility

items.description: Lead end-to-end delivery for Intuit engagements: analyzing PRDs, preparing feasibility documents, running POCs, managing sprint boards, and coordinating developers and QA through daily stand-ups, progressive demos, and stakeholder sign-offs.
Built dynamic pages and a universal UI component library used across teams. Wrote integration and component-level Cypress tests. Built Node/Express/TypeScript APIs for frontend integration.

Led frontend development for a Tally-like accounting web and mobile application. Built automated flows for purchase, sales, expenses, and income — including seamless historical-data migration from Tally.

Designed and implemented a unified video/audio player across Hungama properties and affiliate platforms — a single JS source with flexible customization. Owned integration support and full-stack debugging.
Managed the media player across Moneycontrol, Firstpost, News18, IBNLive and others. Built players with vanilla JS/jQuery and HTML5 and supported affiliate-platform integrations.
Crafted content screens for e-learning courses with HTML/CSS and ActionScript 3.0 — building interactive animations and programmed content for enhanced learner engagement.
Developed Flex/Flash projects integrated with PHP backends and contributed to Xcelsius-based Business Intelligence dashboards.

contact.heading: Let's build something
contact.description: Open to senior frontend engineering roles, integration architecture projects, and interesting collaborations. Email is the fastest way to reach me — I usually respond within a day.
